title: railgun's Redstone Pack
body:
# railgun's Redstone Pack

Visually displays the blockstates of redstone components to be useful in redstone builds.

## Features

Changes textures to visually display generally invisible blockstates.

<details>
    <summary>blocks have been changed</summary>

- Note block - `instrument, note, powered`
- (Sticky) piston - `extended`
- Observer - `facing, powered`
- Dispenser, Dropper - `facing, triggered`
- Hopper - `facing, enabled`
- Lever - `powered`
- Cauldron - `content, level`
- Target - `power`
- (Calibrated) Sculk sensor - `power, cooldown`
- Tripwire, Tripwire hook - `powered`
- End portal frame - `facing`
- Redstone wire - `power`
- Iron door - `powered`
- Iron trapdoor - `facing`
- Composter - `level`
- Daylight detector - `power, inverted`
- Scaffolding - `distance`
- Weighted pressure plate - `power`
- Trapped chest
- Juke box - `has_record`
- Beehive, Bee nest - `honey_level`
- Furnace - `lit`
- Leaves - `distance`
- Repeater - `delay`
- Lectern - `powered`

</details>

## Credits

Made with [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/)

Inspired by:
- [XK Redstone Display](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xk-redstone-display)
- [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks)
